advantages: Built into browsers and modern Node — no dependency needed.
Promise-based, so it composes cleanly with async/await.
Supports streaming via response.body for live token output.
AbortController gives standard timeouts and cancellation.
disadvantages: Doesn't reject on HTTP error statuses — easy to miss failures.
No built-in timeout; you must wire AbortController.
Manual JSON.stringify/parse and header setup (vs a client SDK).
Browser CORS rules can block direct cross-origin calls.
